stocks.impact_theory: Sable Offshore received DOJ legal opinion and Trump admin emergency order to restart Santa Ynez offshore oil operations and pipeline amid Iran war-driven oil surge to $100/bbl. Economic boost to US energy independence; psychology of short squeeze (40% SI) + national security narrative. Parallels: 2022 oil crisis gainers. Analogies: Lighting a match in a room full of shorts (squeeze); oil lifeline in Hormuz storm.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X sentiment exploding on squeeze talk, news coverage as key US oil play amid crisis; web confirms +96% March gains, premarket +7%.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 20-30% gains on squeeze/momentum; target $22-25.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid or short above $22 post-squeeze; potential 10% drop.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Regulatory reversal post-Trump admin, oil price pullback, dilution.

stocks.justification: Strong X buzz, news alignment with macro oil tailwinds, high volume/short interest.

stocks.impact_theory: GTC 2026 kicks off March 16 with Jensen keynote; hype on Rubin AI chips, Blackwell ramp. Implications: AI capex confirmation despite macro (oil/war). Psychology: Event-driven volatility. Parallels: Prior GTC rallies (e.g., +15% post-Blackwell). Analogies: Superbowl for AI (hype spectacle); tightrope over Rubin rumors.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Historical GTC boosts, X predictions positive despite down 25% YTD; web previews Rubin/partner wins.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Buy dips for event pop to $195; 8-12% upside.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short if no catalysts, target $170; 5-10% downside.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Delay rumors, macro selloff from Iran/oil, MU earnings read-through.

stocks.justification: Proven event alpha but macro headwinds (war/oil) temper.

stocks.impact_theory: Issued strong FY2026 guidance: 70%+ rev growth, Q4 beat; silicon-anode batteries for AI/EV. Implications: EV/AI demand tailwind. Psychology: Oversold bounce. Parallels: Battery stocks post-Tesla ramps. Analogies: Rocket fuel in EV race; diamond in battery rough (+55% March).

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Web/X highlight surge on guidance/ESOP; top monthly gainer.

stocks.impact_theory: Oil surges to $100+ on Iran war/Hormuz attacks; XOM benefits as top producer. Implications: Higher margins, buybacks. Psychology: Safe haven energy. Parallels: 2022 Ukraine oil boom. Analogies: Whale in oil tsunami; fortress amid supply crunch.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Macro tailwind from crisis, web calls bargains.

stocks.impact_theory: Similar to XOM; leveraged to crude spike from tanker strikes/Iran conflict. Implications: Dividend aristocrat shine. Psychology: Rotation to energy. Parallels: Gulf War rallies. Analogies: Anchor in energy storm; dividend dam holding flood.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: IEA releases but supply fears persist; web bargains.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Oil cap by releases, demand destruction.
